candidates.why: Represents the full top-line revenue figure; includes all revenue components and matches total revenue definition.
Also a revenue measure but likely a component of Total Revenue; Total Revenue is more comprehensive so this is secondary.
Represents a subcomponent of revenue rather than the total; not the appropriate aggregate top-line measure.
A balancing line, not an economic revenue measure; should not be used for REVT.
Explicitly a balancing item, not a substantive revenue line; should be avoided for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue clearly matches the top-line revenue definition and ties to the main income statement totals.

candidates.why: Likely represents direct subcontracting costs related to providing services; appropriate as a COGS component.
Classical direct material cost; clearly part of COGS.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not a period expense; not suitable for COGS.
Balance sheet inventory category; not an income statement expense flow.

variables.notes: Using the two direct cost components from the income statement as COGS; inventory balances are excluded.

candidates.why: Aggregated operating overhead bucket distinct from COGS and D&A; appropriate SG&A proxy when detailed SG&A is not populated.
Component of operating overhead; also qualifies as SG&A-type expense but is likely a subset of Operating Expenses.

Explicit SG&A label, but appears unpopulated in the main statement columns; per instructions, still should be included, and combined with an overhead bucket such as Operating Expenses to cover all years.

variables.notes: Following rule (b): include explicit SG&A row even if empty in preview plus the broader Operating Expenses bucket to ensure coverage; Other Operating Expenses is a subset and omitted to reduce double counting.
No R&D-related rows are present in the candidate list; treat XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Primary income-statement line for interest expense; suitable core component for XINT.
Additional interest expense component; should be included to capture total interest cost.
Interest component of lease liabilities; belongs in total interest expense for XINT.
Represents minority shareholders’ share of profit, not interest expense; should be excluded.
Duplicate concept of non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Generic interest expense label in supplemental section but with no visible values; less reliable than the populated main-statement interest lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; could duplicate Interest on Financial Lease, risk of double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Explicitly non-interest-bearing; not an interest expense.
Equity for minority shareholders; not interest expense.
Minority equity component; not interest expense.
Future contractual interest within lease disclosures, not period expense; including it would misstate current interest.

variables.notes: Chosen the three operative income-statement interest expense components and excluded supplemental/BS and minority-interest lines to avoid double counting or misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Represents parent shareholders’ equity but excludes non-controlling interests; narrower than total equity but still a valid equity measure.
Appears to be a component of equity, not the total; unsuitable alone for BE.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent
candidates.why: Same concept as above with typo; includes full equity attributable to parent shareholders; still excludes minorities.
Explicit total equity including non-controlling interests; directly matches the requested definition of total/book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item, not a substantive total; should be avoided.
Explicitly a balancing line, not the main equity total.
Balancing line, not the economic equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the whole balance sheet; not pure equity.
Total of both equity and liabilities; not an equity-only measure.

variables.notes: Using Total equity as book equity, consistent with the definition that allows total equity including minorities.

candidates.why: Income statement share of profit attributable to non-controlling interests; relevant concept but for MIB (equity stock) the balance sheet line is usually preferred.
Duplicate of non-controlling interests on the income statement; similar consideration as above.
OCI component related to minorities, not the minority equity balance itself.
OCI share for minorities; not the core minority interest balance.
Balance sheet carrying amount of non-controlling (minority) interests in equity; best match for MIB.
Alternative label for the same balance sheet minority equity; also suitable but redundant if Non-controlling interests is chosen.

variables.notes: MIB mapped to the balance sheet non-controlling interests, which represent the minority equity stake.
